User Satisfaction

Core Features

📊 Smart BP Tracking

Monitor systolic, diastolic, and pulse trends with weekly comparisons.

📁 Secure Prescription Storage

Upload prescriptions safely and access them anytime, anywhere.

🤖 AI Health Plans

Personalized diet and fitness recommendations based on BMI and health data.

⏰ Medicine Reminders

Set scheduled alerts so you never miss a dose again.

What Our Users Say

“Health Adviser helped me consistently monitor my blood pressure and stay on track with medication. The reminders are a lifesaver.”

— Priya M., Pune

“The AI health plan gave me simple, realistic guidance. It feels like having a personal assistant for my health.”

— Rahul K., Mumbai

Your Data Is Protected

We prioritize security and privacy. All medical information is securely stored and accessible only to you. We follow industry-standard encryption practices to protect your sensitive health data.

  • 🔐 Encrypted user authentication
  • 🛡 Secure file storage
  • 🔒 Protected database access

Frequently Asked Questions

Is Health Adviser free to use?

Yes, you can create an account and use core features for free.

Is my medical data safe?

Yes. Your information is securely stored and never shared without consent.

Can I track multiple prescriptions?

Absolutely. You can upload and manage as many prescriptions as needed.

Take Control of Your Health Today

Join thousands of users who are managing their health smarter. Start tracking, organizing, and improving your wellness now.
